testcase.name: test_la_canada_2015
testcase.failure:
self = def test_la_canada_2015(self): """ The 'La Cañada Flintridge city, California' place can be a problem. """ geo = { 'for': 'place:39003', 'in': u'state:06' } self.assertEqual( > self._client.acs5.get('NAME', geo=geo)[0]['NAME'], ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ u'La Cañada Flintridge city, California' ) census/tests/test_census.py:119: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ census/core.py:327: in get return super(ACSClient, self).get(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:173: in get merged_results = [merge(result) for result in zip(*all_results)] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:171: in all_results = (self.query(forty_nine_fields, geo, year, sort_by_geoid=sort_by_geoid, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:62: in wrapper result = func(self, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:202: in query data = json.loads(resp) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/json/__init__.py:352: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/json/decoder.py:345: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = s = 'HTTP Status 405 – Method Not Allowed

HTTP Status 405 – Method Not Allowed

' idx = 0 def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0): """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended. This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may have extraneous data at the end. """ try: obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx) except StopIteration as err: > raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0) /opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/json/decoder.py:363: JSONDecodeError

self = def test_acs5(self): tests = ( ('us', 'United States'), ('state', 'Maryland'), ('state_county', 'Montgomery County, Maryland'), ('state_county_subdivision', 'District 9, Montgomery County, ('state_place', 'Gaithersburg city, Maryland'), ('state_district', 'Congressional District 6 (118th Congress), Maryland'), ('state_congressional_district', 'Congressional District 6 (118th Congress), testcase.name: test_older_sf1
testcase.failure:
self = def test_older_sf1(self): client = Census(KEY) > result_2010 = client.sf1.get( ('P008001', # total 'P008003', # white 'P008004', # black 'P008006', # asian 'P008010', # latino ), geo={'for': 'place:53476', 'in': 'state:06'}, ) census/tests/test_census.py:368: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ census/core.py:469: in get return super(SF1Client, self).get(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:173: in get merged_results = [merge(result) for result in zip(*all_results)] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:171: in all_results = (self.query(forty_nine_fields, geo, year, sort_by_geoid=sort_by_geoid, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:62: in wrapper result = func(self, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:202: in query data = json.loads(resp) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/json/__init__.py:352: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/json/decoder.py:345: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = s = 'HTTP Status 405 – Method Not Allowed

HTTP Status 405 – Method Not Allowed

' idx = 0 def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0): """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended. This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may have extraneous data at the end. """ try: obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx) except StopIteration as err: > raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0) /opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/json/decoder.py:363: JSONDecodeError

testcase.name: test_pl
testcase.failure:
self = def test_pl(self): tests = ( ('us', 'United States'), ('state', 'Maryland'), ('state_county', 'Montgomery County, Maryland'), ('state_county_subdivision', 'District 9, Montgomery County, Maryland'), ('state_county_tract', 'Census Tract 7007.06, Montgomery County, Maryland'), ('state_county_blockgroup', ('Block Group 1, Census Tract 7007.06, ' 'Montgomery County, Maryland')), ('state_place', 'Gaithersburg city, Maryland'), ('state_district', 'Congressional District 6 (116th Congress), Maryland'), ('state_congressional_district', 'Congressional District 6 (116th Congress), Maryland'), ('state_legislative_district_upper', 'State Senate District 6 (2018), Maryland'), ('state_legislative_district_lower', 'State Legislative District 6 (2018), Maryland'), ) > self.check_endpoints('pl', tests) census/tests/test_census.py:284: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ census/tests/test_census.py:146: in check_endpoints testcase.name: test_sf1
testcase.failure:
self = def test_sf1(self): tests = ( ('state', 'Maryland'), ('state_county', 'Montgomery County, Maryland'), ('state_county_subdivision', ('District 9, Montgomery County, Maryland')), ('state_county_tract', 'Census Tract 7007.06, Montgomery County, Maryland'), ('state_county_blockgroup', ('Block Group 1, Census Tract 7007.06, ' 'Montgomery County, Maryland')), ('state_place', 'Gaithersburg city, Maryland'), ('state_congressional_district', 'Congressional District 6 (111th Congress), Maryland'), ('state_msa', ('Washington-Arlington-Alexandria, ' 'DC-VA-MD-WV Metro Area (part); Maryland')), ('state_csa', ('Washington-Baltimore-Northern Virginia, ' 'DC-MD-VA-WV CSA (part); Maryland')), # ('state_district_place', 'District 9'), ('state_zipcode', 'ZCTA5 20877, Maryland'), ) > self.check_endpoints('sf1', tests) census/tests/test_census.py:258: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ census/tests/test_census.py:146: in check_endpoints data = method(fields, **TEST_DATA, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:52: in wrapper return func(self, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:241: in state return self.get(fields, geo={ census/core.py:469: in get return super(SF1Client, self).get(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:173: in get merged_results = [merge(result) for result in zip(*all_results)] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:171: in all_results = (self.query(forty_nine_fields, geo, year, sort_by_geoid=sort_by_geoid, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:62: in wrapper result = func(self, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ census/core.py:202: in query data = json.loads(resp) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/json/__init__.py:352: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/json/decoder.py:345: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = s = 'HTTP Status 405 – Method Not Allowed
